key_concerns: Adequacy of available data for MRD as endpoint
Applicability across different MM disease settings

evidence_notes: The FDA questions the adequacy of data to support MRD as an accelerated approval endpoint (Q1: 'Discuss the adequacy of the available data...')
Uncertainty about data supporting MRD use in newly diagnosed and relapsed/refractory MM (Q2: 'Discuss whether the available data supports...')
Concerns about specific MRD assessment timepoints and durability requirement (Q3: 'Discuss the acceptability of the timepoints...', 'Requirement for assessment of durability')
Vote question implies evidence is borderline (Q4: 'Does the evidence support...')
key_concerns: Adequacy of available data for MRD as endpoint
Applicability across different MM disease settings

questions_framing.focus: adequacy and applicability of MRD as surrogate endpoint
questions_framing.type: discussion and vote questions highlighting evidence gaps

document.title: April 12, 2024 Meeting of the Oncologic Drugs Advisory Committee- Final Questions

signal.label: MIXED
rationale: Concerns: Adequacy of available data for MRD as endpoint; Applicability across different MM disease settings; Acceptability of MRD assessment timepoints; Durability of MRD negative response
